mnemonics: S.C.O.T.T. (Scope, Capacity, Objectives, Team, Timeline) - A person's name to remember the core components of a project plan.
keyPoints: Define clear business requirements and objectives first.
Assess current data sources and their quality.
Plan for scalability and future growth from the start.
commonMistakes: Starting technical design without finalized business requirements.
Underestimating the importance of data quality assessment.
Ignoring the need for a phased rollout plan.
